output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?area WHERE {
  wd:Q3137019 wdt:P585 ?eventYear .
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventYear) = 2019)
  .
  wd:Q3137019 p:P529 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P529 ?player .
  ?statement pq:P1817 ?seed .
  FILTER(?seed = 7)
  .
  ?player wdt:P27 ?country .
  ?country wdt:P2046 ?area .
}
